title: Wakes Compat for Valkyrien Skies
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hQKH2__aUHs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## This mod is now built in to [wakes reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes-reforged)! Installing a compat mod for VS2 is no longer required.

If you use fabric, consider trying forge :)


----


Adds [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) compatibility for [Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies)! Works with Shaders!! 

Note that this mod works only with  **_Version 0.2.4_**  of Wakes. Do not use the latest Wakes Mod!!

Ships seen in video are naturally generating structures, found in [Valkyrien Pirates](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-pirates).

Enjoy!!
